utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Thank you so much for coming back over .

utterances.speaker: Mona
utterances.text: Oh good , you are here . Yeah , and I was worried that it was going to be uncomfortable .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I know Mona , just hear me out .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: First of all , I am so sorry about my father yelling at you , but I heard you totally held your own .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am so sorry about my father yelling at you

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You are gonna have to tell me how you did that .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay . Um ... But ... Okay , yes Ross and I used to date . And yes we are gonna have a baby . But we are definitely not getting back together .
